description_long: This is a rounded ceramic cup with a single, thick handle attached to one side. The exterior surface is predominantly white and features a whimsical, cartoon-like illustration of a face along with playful handwritten text. The cup has a wide opening and a slightly bulbous body, making it suitable for holding hot beverages. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The surface finish appears matte with a slight texture, and the cup is decorated with both text and artwork, giving it a personalized, handcrafted feel. There is no lid present, and the cup is designed to be both functional and visually engaging.
description: A white, rounded ceramic cup with a thick handle, decorated with cartoon artwork and handwritten text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle, cartoon face, and handwritten text on the cup's surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the handle's attachment and the cup's rounded body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the cup and the handle on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the handwritten text and a partial view of the artwork.
